summary:
Wiki lint complete for 2026-05-07.

**Pass 1 — Structural fixes:**
- Verified 137 content pages (6 topics, 22 sources, 3 timelines, 79 entities, 27 ideas) all have matching files and index entries
- Zero broken wikilinks across all content pages
- Fixed 7 orphan entity pages by adding inbound links from relevant topics/sources:
  - `web-design-skill`, `future-agi`, `mercury-agent`, `gemini-3-deep-think`, `cambridge-neuromorphic-chip`
- Removed 2 fully orphaned entity pages with negligible traction: `agentswift` (39 stars) and `agent-context` (2 stars)
- Updated index: entity count corrected 81 → 79
- No companies or people found in entities/

**Pass 2 — Wrong & duplicate information:**
- Merged duplicate Meta ARI acquisition rows in `topics/ai_companies.md`
- Fixed stale claim in `entities/gpt-5.4.md`: now notes it was superseded by GPT-5.5 as flagship
- Verified no duplicate paragraphs or additional stale claims

**Pass 3 — Connection quality:**
- All 6 topic pages have `## Evolution` and `## Patterns & Insights`
- No bare "Related:", "See also:", or unannotated links found
- Recent daily insights (May 2–6) all map to existing idea pages

**Pass 4 — Index & Log:**
- Updated `index.md` last_updated to 2026-05-07
- Appended comprehensive lint entry to `wiki/log.md`
